parsed.production_notes: The video consists entirely of scrolling text on a solid background with an AI-generated voiceover. There are no human actors, live-action footage, or complex graphics.

scenes.setting: Solid purple background, no physical location.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, uniform purple background fills the entire frame. There are no objects, characters, or variations in lighting or texture. The color is a flat, medium-light purple.

scenes.visual_description: The entire video is a single, continuous shot of black text scrolling upwards against a solid purple background. The text is a motivational speech about learning English. The layout remains static throughout the video, with only the text moving.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: Speak fast and clear: I want to learn English because I have big dreams. I want to have a good job, earn money, and help my family. I want to be proud of myself. I want to speak English well, travel to many countries, and meet new people. I know that English is the key to a better life.

Unknown speaker says: Sometimes, I feel tired. Sometimes, I feel lazy. Sometimes, I look at English books and feel bored. But I tell myself: "Keep going."

Unknown speaker says: Even if I practice only 10 minutes today with MySivi, it will make me better. Even if I make mistakes, MySivi's AI teacher will help me learn from them. I don't need to be perfect. I just need to try. Step by step, day by day MySivi helps me grow.

Unknown speaker says: When I feel sad, I remember why I started. I remember my goals. I open MySivi, take a deep breath, and begin again.

Unknown speaker says: Learning English is not easy, but MySivi makes it worth it. Every new sentence I speak is a small victory. Every conversation with the AI brings me closer to my dreams.

Unknown speaker says: I don't compare myself to others. I only compare myself to who I was yesterday. And MySivi shows me my progress every day.

Unknown speaker says: I believe in myself. I know I can do it. And one day, I will look back and say: "Yes, I did it. I didn't give up."

Unknown speaker says: So today, I choose to keep going with MySivi. Because my future depends on what I do now. And I want that future to be bright.

[music only, no speech]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Speak fast and clear:
I want to learn English because I have big dreams.
I want to have a good job, earn money, and help my family.
I want to be proud of myself.
I want to speak English well, travel to many countries, and meet new people.
I know that English is the key to a better life.
Sometimes, I feel tired.
Sometimes, I feel lazy.
Sometimes, I look at English books and feel bored.
But I tell myself: "Keep going."
Even if I practice only 10 minutes today with MySivi, it will make me better.
Even if I make mistakes, MySivi's AI teacher will help me learn from them.
I don't need to be perfect.
I just need to try.
Step by step, day by day MySivi helps me grow.
When I feel sad, I remember why I started.
I remember my goals.
I open MySivi, take a deep breath, and begin again.
Learning English is not easy, but MySivi makes it worth it.
Every new sentence I speak is a small victory.
Every conversation with the AI brings me closer to my dreams.
I don't compare myself to others.
I only compare myself to who I was yesterday.
And MySivi shows me my progress every day.
I believe in myself.
I know I can do it.
And one day, I will look back and say: "Yes, I did it. I didn't give up."
So today, I choose to keep going with MySivi.
Because my future depends on what I do now.
And I want that future to be bright.
You can also download MySivi and start your English Journey at Just ₹3.
It has already helped 50 lakh+ people learn English.
